summary: Iteration 54 - Collab Hub Security Hardening & In-App Messaging System. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login with submitkalmori@gmail.com works
Backend: SECURITY - GET /api/collab-hub/posts does NOT return user_id field
Backend: SECURITY - GET /api/collab-hub/posts excludes current user's own posts
Backend: SECURITY - GET /api/collab-hub/invites does NOT return to_user_id or from_user_id
Backend: SECURITY - PUT /api/collab-hub/posts/{id} fails for non-owner (404)
Backend: SECURITY - DELETE /api/collab-hub/posts/{id} fails for non-owner (404)
Backend: MESSAGING - GET /api/messages/conversations returns list
Backend: MESSAGING - GET /api/messages/unread/count returns unread count
Backend: MESSAGING - GET /api/messages/{convo_id} returns 404 for non-participant
Backend: MESSAGING - POST /api/messages/{convo_id} returns 404 for non-participant
Backend: MESSAGING - All endpoints require authentication (401)
Backend: FULL FLOW - Register second user, create post, send invite, accept, auto-create conversation, exchange messages, verify privacy
Backend: MESSAGING - Notifications endpoint works
Frontend: Login with submitkalmori@gmail.com works
Frontend: Sidebar has 'Messages' link with ChatCircle icon
Frontend: Navigate to /messages page works
Frontend: Messages page shows 'Messages' title
Frontend: Conversation list displays conversations
Frontend: Clicking conversation opens chat view
Frontend: System message 'Collaboration accepted!' appears in chat
Frontend: Chat partner name displayed correctly
Frontend: Message input with placeholder 'Type a message...'
Frontend: Send message button visible and functional
Frontend: Messages sent appear in chat
Frontend: Collab Hub page loads with tabs (Browse, My Posts, Invites)
Frontend: Invites tab shows Received and Sent sections
seed_data_creation: Test users and posts created during testing were cleaned up. One conversation exists from full flow test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 54 tested three changes: 1) Collab Hub security hardening - browse endpoint excludes user_id and own posts, invites endpoint excludes user IDs, ownership checks work. 2) Email system uses Resend API with support@kalmori.org (not tested in this iteration). 3) In-App Messaging system fully working - conversations auto-create on invite accept, messages are private to participants, notifications created on new messages. Admin email changed to submitkalmori@gmail.com. MessagesPage.jsx at /messages route with full chat functionality.

changes.browse_excludes_own: GET /api/collab-hub/posts excludes current user's posts (they go to my-posts)

endpoints.GET /api/messages/conversations: Returns list of conversations for current user with last_message, unread_count, other_user
endpoints.GET /api/messages/{convo_id}: Returns messages for conversation (404 if not participant)
endpoints.POST /api/messages/{convo_id}: Sends message to conversation (404 if not participant)

features.auto_create_conversation: Conversation auto-created when collab invite is accepted
features.system_message: System message 'Collaboration accepted!' inserted on conversation creation
features.message_privacy: Users can only access conversations they are participants in
features.notifications: Notification created when message is sent to other participant
features.polling: Frontend polls for new messages every 4 seconds

frontend.conversation_list: Shows other user name, last message preview, unread count badge
frontend.chat_view: Shows messages with sender alignment, timestamps, system messages styled differently
frontend.message_input: Text input with Enter to send, send button
